subject: A centaur figure raises a fist in triumph before a cheering crowd, gothic architecture behind
description: A centaur figure at the center of the composition rears up slightly and raises one arm in a gesture of rallying or triumph. The figure wears ornate patterned clothing — layers of fabric with gold detailing — and has loosely curled hair. Surrounding them, a crowd of humanoid figures raises their arms and appears to cheer or respond. In the background, tall gothic stone arches and towers glow warmly, suggesting a city square or plaza at golden hour. The overall composition reads as a public address or moment of solidarity.
foreground: Centaur in patterned ornate clothing, arm raised; cheering crowd around them
background: Gothic stone arches and towers, warm golden light
emotion: fervent; the crowd and speaker are united in a shared cause
